steps.title: Use the contrast after but
steps.content: MoMA says video presentations are used when playable display would be impractical. The underlined sentence pushes back by noting that video games are inherently interactive, a feature missing from video-only presentations.

steps.title: Identify the critical function
steps.content: A misstates the point because interactivity is presented as inherent to video games. B invents agreement about games as art, and C calls the issue a misconception. The sentence gives a reason to question MoMA's approach. The answer is D.
